shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The eye line and transparent cutout workflow remain aligned with the main slime family.
differences: The fill shifts to candy pink with teal edge pixels for a hybrid support read.
A gelatin wobble stretches the upper dome further than the normal bubble loop.
The mouth curve makes the support role feel friendlier and more restorative.

context.usage: Support evolution that grants a restorative identity and codex variety.

specs.texture: Gelatin body with bright sparkle clusters and a soft lower edge.
specs.shading: Flat fill with a bright top highlight.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 288x48px with 6 columns and 1 row.
The smile arc remains readable at native scale.
The wobble amplitude stays within 4px so the silhouette remains centered.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with the shared slime animation system and a support-role marker.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_bubble_jelly_idle_6f_8fps.png during the Loading state and attach it to the support evolution atlas registry.
runtime_notes: Keep the jelly animation vertically elastic while leaving the cell center fixed.
Expose a support-role tag to feedback systems.
Preserve distinct pink and teal clusters on moss tiles.
